titles.title: God Our Help In Ages Past

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: O God, our help in ages past, our hope for years to come, our shelter from the stormy blast, and our eternal home.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Under the shadow of thy throne, still may we dwell secure; sufficient is thine arm alone, and our defense is sure.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Before the hills in order stood, or earth received her frame, from everlasting, thou art God, to endless years the same.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: A thousand ages, in thy sight, are like an evening gone; short as the watch that ends the night, before the rising sun.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Time, like an ever rolling stream, bears all who breathe away; they fly forgotten, as a dream dies at the opening day.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: O God, our help in ages past, our hope for years to come; be thou our guide while life shall last, and our eternal home.
